violations.text: Prepackage/precooked eggs were observed held at (128) degrees Fahrenheit located in drive-thru hot hold unit. Employee reheated eggs to 154 degrees Fahrenheit at time of inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

Precooked/prepackaged Suasage was observed held at (130) degrees Fahrenheit located at drive-thru hot hold unit. Employee reheated sausage to 169 degrees Fahrenheit at time of inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

Handwashing sink located in the (drive thru) area was not in good repair. Observed handwashing sink with a clogged drained. Handwashing sink was serviced at time of inspection. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

Observed the drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. PIC put in a service order for dumpster drain plug. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

Employees beverages were observed stored in a food storage area near prep line. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2024
The front hand wash sink was observed being used as a dump sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2024

Thermometers are lacking in several refrigeration units. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
The fans/fan covers of several refrigeration units were observed with an accumulation biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2024

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023
Drive thru refrigerator door gasket was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered (Missing lid.) Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024
